accurate.why: The characterization of the bill as providing 'statutory authority' is accurate real-world context about the legal effect of adding this provision.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill as providing statutory authority for DHS S&T to support drug detection.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Characterizes the bill as adding statutory authority to the Homeland Security Act.

exceptions_conditions.why: The rule of construction is minor and its omission is acceptable for a brief summary.

effective_dates.why: No explicit effective date; omission appropriate.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the research/development mandate, three technology categories, NIST and DEA reliance requirements.

concise.why: Appropriately concise for a brief CRS summary.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
